summary: PR 2449 decompiled and typed several mninfo menu functions, added local data declarations and includes, and updated mninfo.h prototypes from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to recovered signatures. The only loaded feedback is an automated decomp report showing one new .bss match and score improvements for multiple mninfo functions; there are no loaded human review comments or PR body details.

key_files.role: Primary decomp source file; replaces placeholders with implementations for mnInfo_80251AFC, mnInfo_80251D58, fn_80251FE4, fn_802523D8, fn_80252548, mnInfo_80252758, adjusts mnInfo_80251F04, adds includes, local cursor struct, and mnInfo data declarations.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mninfo.c placeholder removals and function bodies
bot_report: improvements for fn_80251FE4, mnInfo_80251AFC, fn_80252548, mnInfo_80251D58, mnInfo_80252758, fn_802523D8, mnInfo_80251F04

key_files.role: Header prototype cleanup; replaces UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS for newly recovered mninfo functions with concrete return and argument types.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mninfo.h prototypes for mnInfo_80251AFC, mnInfo_80251D58, fn_80251FE4, fn_802523D8, fn_80252548, mnInfo_80252758

what_changed: Added includes for gm_1601, gm/types, lbarchive, lbaudio_ax, mn/inlines, sc/types, baselib debug/gobjgxlink/gobjobject/gobjproc/memory to support recovered mninfo code.
Added a local MnInfoTextCursor struct with padded fields for left and right HSD_Text pointers, plus declarations for mnInfo_804A0958, mnInfo_804A0968, mnInfo_804D6C78, and extern mn_804D4B64.
Implemented mnInfo_80251AFC as two nested-loop passes over 0x42 entries to initialize and reorder mnInfo_804A0968 using mnInfo_80251A08 and gmMainLib_8015D804.
Implemented mnInfo_80251D58 to create/update left-column date/time text, including US versus non-US date formatting via lbLang_IsSavedLanguageUS.
Reworked mnInfo_80251F04 signature and body to use MenuInfo_GObj, right_column text slots, HSD_SisLib_803A5ACC, and un_802FE3F8 result text.
Implemented fn_80251FE4 input handling for back/up/down menu inputs, scroll index changes, text cleanup, and visible row regeneration.
Implemented fn_802523D8 and fn_80252548 process handlers for menu state transition cleanup, arrow visibility, animation, initial row generation, JObj setup, and process switching.
Implemented mnInfo_80252758 to enter menu kind 0x1D, load MenMainConSs assets, allocate/init MnInfoData, create GObjs/procs, create description text, and start input handling.
Updated mninfo.h prototypes for recovered functions, replacing unknown return/params with s32 or void and typed parameters.

smart_moves.text: Header prototypes were updated alongside function recovery instead of leaving UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS after bodies revealed signatures.
Repeated row cleanup and row population are expressed as bounded loops over four visible entries, rather than leaving fully duplicated row-specific blocks.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: fn_80251FE4 cleanup do-while i < 4 and for i < 4 population
raw_diff: fn_802523D8 and fn_80252548 cleanup loops

smart_moves.text: Text object slots are accessed through MnInfoData fields and a small temporary cursor struct instead of opaque raw offsets everywhere.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When recovering a menu file, update the owning header as soon as function bodies prove signatures; this PR changed multiple mninfo prototypes from unknown placeholders to typed declarations in the same slice.

For menu rows stored as adjacent text slots, a temporary internal cursor struct can make repeated slot cleanup readable while preserving unusual stride behavior; keep the evidence narrow because this PR still uses explicit byte-stride casts.
Automated progress comments may report partial function improvements rather than full matches; record exact reported percentages and do not convert them into completed-match claims.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report lists 9 improvements in unmatched items with percentages

naming_conventions.name: mnInfo_80251AFC, mnInfo_80251D58, mnInfo_80251F04, mnInfo_80252758
naming_conventions.lesson: The PR keeps address-style names for recovered mninfo functions where semantic names are not evidenced in the slice.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: function definitions and header prototypes

naming_conventions.name: fn_80251FE4, fn_802523D8, fn_80252548
naming_conventions.lesson: Unclear process callbacks remain fn_ address-style names rather than invented semantic names.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: function definitions and header prototypes

naming_conventions.name: MnInfoTextCursor
naming_conventions.lesson: A small semantic helper type was introduced for left/right HSD_Text cursor access, with padding fields preserving observed offsets.

naming_conventions.name: temp_r3, temp_r31, var_r26, var_r27
naming_conventions.lesson: Some generated-style temporary names remain in the recovered source, indicating the slice prioritizes matching/progress over full local-name cleanup.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.details: The PR adds or preserves scoped dont_inline blocks around mnInfo_80251A08, mnInfo_80251D58, mnInfo_80251F04, and mnInfo_80252720.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: #pragma push / #pragma dont_inline on around listed functions

assembly_or_matching_tactics.details: fn_802523D8 includes PAD_STACK(16), a narrow stack-shaping tactic. The loaded evidence does not include objdiff proof beyond the bot score report.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.details: The PR uses nested for loops for 0x42 trophy ordering/counting and four-entry for/do-while loops for visible menu rows and cleanup.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: fn_80251FE4 count loop and four-entry population loops

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Inline asset-name strings passed to lbArchive_LoadSections
assembly_or_matching_tactics.details: mnInfo_80252758 keeps MenMainConSs asset names inline when loading sections, consistent with the standard to avoid unnecessary string-literal symbol promotion.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbArchive_LoadSections with "MenMainConSs_Top_joint" and related strings

accepted_candidate_records.title: Header cleanup should accompany recovered mninfo bodies
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2449 recovered several src/melee/mn/mninfo.c bodies and updated src/melee/mn/mninfo.h prototypes from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to concrete signatures in the same change. This is a grounded example of truthful header maintenance during decomp progress.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Do not overstate bot-reported partial improvements as matches
accepted_candidate_records.text: The PR's bot report lists one new .bss match but describes nine function/section changes as improvements in unmatched items with percentages. Curated records should preserve that distinction.

source_update_candidates.title: mninfo source/header own Data Special info menu setup and scrolling functions
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2449 evidence suggests src/melee/mn/mninfo.c and src/melee/mn/mninfo.h contain Data Special/info menu routines for loading MenMainConSs assets, creating MnInfoData, rendering description/date/right-column text, and handling back/up/down scroll input. Curator should verify against current source before promoting as a path fact.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mnInfo_80252758 menu setup and asset loading
raw_diff: fn_802523D8 arrow visibility and menu-state checks
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful searchable path fact, but the PR slice alone may not establish the full subsystem ownership or final current-source state.

source_update_candidates.title: Temporary cursor structs for strided overlay access need narrow evidence
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2449 uses MnInfoTextCursor with padding and casts that advance by 4 bytes to clean up left/right HSD_Text slots across four menu rows. This may be a reusable pattern for expressing overlapped/strided struct access, but it should remain evidence-gated and not become a broad recommendation without more examples.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: left/right pointer cleanup loops with ((u8*) cursor + 4)
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential standard nuance for temporary internal structs, but current evidence is one PR and includes unusual pointer-stride casts.

rejection_notes: Do not record full function matches for mnInfo_80251AFC, mnInfo_80251D58, fn_80251FE4, fn_802523D8, fn_80252548, mnInfo_80252758, or mnInfo_80251F04; the loaded bot report only says these unmatched items improved.
Do not infer human reviewer approval or requested changes; no human review comments are loaded.
Do not promote PAD_STACK(16) or dont_inline pragmas as generally accepted style from this PR alone; standards require narrow verifier evidence, and only score-report evidence is loaded.
Do not infer semantic renames for fn_ address-style callbacks; the PR retained address-style names.
